question: 查询所有金牌客户的名称和所在城市。
gold_sql:
SELECT c.customer_name, c.city
FROM customers c
WHERE c.level = 'gold'
ORDER BY c.customer_name ASC;
sqlplus:
FROM customers c
| WHERE c.level = 'gold'
| SELECT c.customer_name, c.city
| ORDER c.customer_name ASC

question: 查询北京客户的客户名称和客户等级。
gold_sql:
SELECT c.customer_name, c.level
FROM customers c
WHERE c.city = 'Beijing'
ORDER BY c.customer_name ASC;
sqlplus:
FROM customers c
| WHERE c.city = 'Beijing'
| SELECT c.customer_name, c.level
| ORDER c.customer_name ASC

question: 查询价格高于1000元的商品名称、类别和价格。
gold_sql:
SELECT p.product_name, p.category, p.price
FROM products p
WHERE p.price > 1000
ORDER BY p.price DESC;
sqlplus:
FROM products p
| WHERE p.price > 1000
| SELECT p.product_name, p.category, p.price
| ORDER p.price DESC

question: 查询2025年3月之后的已支付订单编号和日期。
gold_sql:
SELECT o.order_id, o.order_date
FROM orders o
WHERE o.order_date >= '2025-03-01' AND o.status = 'paid'
ORDER BY o.order_date ASC;
sqlplus:
FROM orders o
| WHERE o.order_date >= '2025-03-01'
| WHERE o.status = 'paid'
| SELECT o.order_id, o.order_date
| ORDER o.order_date ASC

question: 查询单价低于200元的订单明细编号、商品编号和数量。
gold_sql:
SELECT oi.item_id, oi.product_id, oi.quantity
FROM order_items oi
WHERE oi.unit_price < 200
ORDER BY oi.quantity DESC;
sqlplus:
FROM order_items oi
| WHERE oi.unit_price < 200
| SELECT oi.item_id, oi.product_id, oi.quantity
| ORDER oi.quantity DESC

question: 查询价格最高的两个商品。
gold_sql:
SELECT p.product_name, p.price
FROM products p
ORDER BY p.price DESC
LIMIT 2;
sqlplus:
FROM products p
| SELECT p.product_name, p.price
| ORDER p.price DESC
| LIMIT 2

question: 查询上海客户的已支付订单总销售额，按客户分组并按销售额降序排列。
gold_sql:
SELECT c.customer_name, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_sales
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
WHERE c.city = 'Shanghai' AND o.status = 'paid'
GROUP BY c.customer_name
ORDER BY total_sales DESC;
sqlplus:
FROM customers c
| JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
| JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
| WHERE c.city = 'Shanghai'
| WHERE o.status = 'paid'
| GROUP c.customer_name
| AGG c.customer_name, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_sales
| ORDER total_sales DESC

question: 找出2025年销量最高的前三个商品名称和销量。
gold_sql:
SELECT p.product_name, SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_quantity
FROM products p
JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id
JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE o.order_date >= '2025-01-01' AND o.order_date < '2026-01-01' AND o.status = 'paid'
GROUP BY p.product_name
ORDER BY total_quantity DESC
LIMIT 3;
sqlplus:
FROM products p
| JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id
| JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
| WHERE o.order_date >= '2025-01-01'
| WHERE o.order_date < '2026-01-01'
| WHERE o.status = 'paid'
| GROUP p.product_name
| AGG p.product_name, SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_quantity
| ORDER total_quantity DESC
| LIMIT 3

question: 统计每个城市的已支付订单数量，只保留订单数大于1的城市。
gold_sql:
SELECT c.city, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS paid_order_count
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
WHERE o.status = 'paid'
GROUP BY c.city
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) > 1
ORDER BY paid_order_count DESC;
sqlplus:
FROM customers c
| JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
| WHERE o.status = 'paid'
| GROUP c.city
| AGG c.city, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS paid_order_count
| HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) > 1
| ORDER paid_order_count DESC

question: 查询购买过电脑类商品的金牌客户名称。
gold_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.customer_name
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id
WHERE c.level = 'gold' AND p.category = 'computer' AND o.status = 'paid'
ORDER BY c.customer_name ASC;
sqlplus:
FROM customers c
| JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
| JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
| JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id
| WHERE c.level = 'gold'
| WHERE p.category = 'computer'
| WHERE o.status = 'paid'
| SELECT DISTINCT c.customer_name
| ORDER c.customer_name ASC

question: 查询每个商品类别的销售额，并按销售额从高到低排序。
gold_sql:
SELECT p.category, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_sales
FROM products p
JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id
JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE o.status = 'paid'
GROUP BY p.category
ORDER BY total_sales DESC;
sqlplus:
FROM products p
| JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id
| JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
| WHERE o.status = 'paid'
| GROUP p.category
| AGG p.category, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_sales
| ORDER total_sales DESC

question: 找出总消费超过10000元的客户及其消费金额。
gold_sql:
SELECT c.customer_name, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_sales
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
WHERE o.status = 'paid'
GROUP BY c.customer_name
HAVING SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) > 10000
ORDER BY total_sales DESC;
sqlplus:
FROM customers c
| JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
| JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
| WHERE o.status = 'paid'
| GROUP c.customer_name
| AGG c.customer_name, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_sales
| HAVING SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) > 10000
| ORDER total_sales DESC

question: 统计每个客户的已支付订单数。
gold_sql:
SELECT c.customer_name, COUNT(o.order_id) AS paid_orders
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
WHERE o.status = 'paid'
GROUP BY c.customer_name
ORDER BY paid_orders DESC;
sqlplus:
FROM customers c
| JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
| WHERE o.status = 'paid'
| GROUP c.customer_name
| AGG c.customer_name, COUNT(o.order_id) AS paid_orders
| ORDER paid_orders DESC

question: 查询每个商品类别的平均商品标价。
gold_sql:
SELECT p.category, AVG(p.price) AS avg_price
FROM products p
GROUP BY p.category
ORDER BY avg_price DESC;
sqlplus:
FROM products p
| GROUP p.category
| AGG p.category, AVG(p.price) AS avg_price
| ORDER avg_price DESC

question: 查询每个客户等级的客户数量。
gold_sql:
SELECT c.level, COUNT(*) AS customer_count
FROM customers c
GROUP BY c.level
ORDER BY customer_count DESC;
sqlplus:
FROM customers c
| GROUP c.level
| AGG c.level, COUNT(*) AS customer_count
| ORDER customer_count DESC

question: 查询已支付订单中每个商品的销售额。
gold_sql:
SELECT p.product_name, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_sales
FROM products p
JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id
JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE o.status = 'paid'
GROUP BY p.product_name
ORDER BY total_sales DESC;
sqlplus:
FROM products p
| JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id
| JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
| WHERE o.status = 'paid'
| GROUP p.product_name
| AGG p.product_name, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_sales
| ORDER total_sales DESC

question: 查询取消订单涉及的客户名称和订单编号。
gold_sql:
SELECT c.customer_name, o.order_id
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
WHERE o.status = 'cancelled'
ORDER BY o.order_id ASC;
sqlplus:
FROM customers c
| JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
| WHERE o.status = 'cancelled'
| SELECT c.customer_name, o.order_id
| ORDER o.order_id ASC

question: 查询每个城市的客户数量。
gold_sql:
SELECT c.city, COUNT(*) AS customer_count
FROM customers c
GROUP BY c.city
ORDER BY customer_count DESC, c.city ASC;
sqlplus:
FROM customers c
| GROUP c.city
| AGG c.city, COUNT(*) AS customer_count
| ORDER customer_count DESC, c.city ASC

question: 查询每个订单的订单金额，只统计已支付订单。
gold_sql:
SELECT o.order_id, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS order_amount
FROM orders o
JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
WHERE o.status = 'paid'
GROUP BY o.order_id
ORDER BY order_amount DESC;
sqlplus:
FROM orders o
| JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
| WHERE o.status = 'paid'
| GROUP o.order_id
| AGG o.order_id, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS order_amount
| ORDER order_amount DESC

question: 查询订单金额超过5000元的订单编号和金额。
gold_sql:
SELECT o.order_id, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS order_amount
FROM orders o
JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
WHERE o.status = 'paid'
GROUP BY o.order_id
HAVING SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) > 5000
ORDER BY order_amount DESC;
sqlplus:
FROM orders o
| JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
| WHERE o.status = 'paid'
| GROUP o.order_id
| AGG o.order_id, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS order_amount
| HAVING SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) > 5000
| ORDER order_amount DESC

question: 查询家具类商品的已支付销售数量。
gold_sql:
SELECT p.category, SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_quantity
FROM products p
JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id
JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE p.category = 'furniture' AND o.status = 'paid'
GROUP BY p.category;
sqlplus:
FROM products p
| JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id
| JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
| WHERE p.category = 'furniture'
| WHERE o.status = 'paid'
| GROUP p.category
| AGG p.category, SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_quantity

question: 查询每个客户购买的不同商品种类数。
gold_sql:
SELECT c.customer_name, COUNT(DISTINCT oi.product_id) AS product_types
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
WHERE o.status = 'paid'
GROUP BY c.customer_name
ORDER BY product_types DESC;
sqlplus:
FROM customers c
| JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
| JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
| WHERE o.status = 'paid'
| GROUP c.customer_name
| AGG c.customer_name, COUNT(DISTINCT oi.product_id) AS product_types
| ORDER product_types DESC

question: 查询销售数量超过5件的商品名称和数量。
gold_sql:
SELECT p.product_name, SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_quantity
FROM products p
JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id
JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE o.status = 'paid'
GROUP BY p.product_name
HAVING SUM(oi.quantity) > 5
ORDER BY total_quantity DESC;
sqlplus:
FROM products p
| JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id
| JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
| WHERE o.status = 'paid'
| GROUP p.product_name
| AGG p.product_name, SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_quantity
| HAVING SUM(oi.quantity) > 5
| ORDER total_quantity DESC

question: 查询每个城市的已支付销售额。
gold_sql:
SELECT c.city, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_sales
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
WHERE o.status = 'paid'
GROUP BY c.city
ORDER BY total_sales DESC;
sqlplus:
FROM customers c
| JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
| JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
| WHERE o.status = 'paid'
| GROUP c.city
| AGG c.city, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_sales
| ORDER total_sales DESC

question: 查询已支付订单中单项金额最高的三条明细。
gold_sql:
SELECT oi.item_id, p.product_name, oi.quantity * oi.unit_price AS item_amount
FROM order_items oi
JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id
WHERE o.status = 'paid'
ORDER BY item_amount DESC
LIMIT 3;
sqlplus:
FROM order_items oi
| JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
| JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id
| WHERE o.status = 'paid'
| SELECT oi.item_id, p.product_name, oi.quantity * oi.unit_price AS item_amount
| ORDER item_amount DESC
| LIMIT 3

question: 查询没有被取消的订单编号、客户名称和状态。
gold_sql:
SELECT o.order_id, c.customer_name, o.status
FROM orders o
JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
WHERE o.status <> 'cancelled'
ORDER BY o.order_id ASC;
sqlplus:
FROM orders o
| JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
| WHERE o.status <> 'cancelled'
| SELECT o.order_id, c.customer_name, o.status
| ORDER o.order_id ASC

question: 查询每个客户最近一次订单日期。
gold_sql:
SELECT c.customer_name, MAX(o.order_date) AS last_order_date
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
GROUP BY c.customer_name
ORDER BY last_order_date DESC;
sqlplus:
FROM customers c
| JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
| GROUP c.customer_name
| AGG c.customer_name, MAX(o.order_date) AS last_order_date
| ORDER last_order_date DESC

question: 查询每个商品类别的最高订单明细单价。
gold_sql:
SELECT p.category, MAX(oi.unit_price) AS max_unit_price
FROM products p
JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id
GROUP BY p.category
ORDER BY max_unit_price DESC;
sqlplus:
FROM products p
| JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id
| GROUP p.category
| AGG p.category, MAX(oi.unit_price) AS max_unit_price
| ORDER max_unit_price DESC

question: 查询销售额超过10000元的城市。
gold_sql:
SELECT c.city, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_sales
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
WHERE o.status = 'paid'
GROUP BY c.city
HAVING SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) > 10000
ORDER BY total_sales DESC;
sqlplus:
FROM customers c
| JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
| JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
| WHERE o.status = 'paid'
| GROUP c.city
| AGG c.city, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_sales
| HAVING SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) > 10000
| ORDER total_sales DESC

question: 查询每个客户等级的已支付销售额，且只保留销售额超过5000元的等级。
gold_sql:
SELECT c.level, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_sales
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
WHERE o.status = 'paid'
GROUP BY c.level
HAVING SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) > 5000
ORDER BY total_sales DESC;
sqlplus:
FROM customers c
| JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
| JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
| WHERE o.status = 'paid'
| GROUP c.level
| AGG c.level, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS total_sales
| HAVING SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) > 5000
| ORDER total_sales DESC
